● Update(claude_sessions.rs)
  ⎿  Added 2 lines, removed 1 line
      1134      // the welcome box truncates long model names ("claude-fable-5 with high
      1135      // effo… ·"), reading an idle session as Active forever. The timer suffix
      1136      // disambiguates — a live spinner always renders "… (<elapsed>…", truncated
      1137 -    // prose never grows a paren — so we require it.
      1137 +    // prose never grows a paren — so we require it. The word before "…" can end
      1138 +    // in a digit too ("Wiring Postgres backups to R2…"), hence \p{N}.
      1139      // A live spinner is unambiguous: Claude is working THIS frame. We do NOT gate
      1140      // it on has_prompt_at_end — the TUI always renders its input box ("❯ ") at the
      1141      // bottom of the pane even while the spinner runs above it, so that guard would

● Update(claude_sessions.rs)
  ⎿  Added 1 line, removed 1 line
      1141      // bottom of the pane even while the spinner runs above it, so that guard would
      1142      // veto Active on essentially every frame. The genuine "stopped, waiting on me"
      1143      // cases (selector / AskUserQuestion) are matched earlier and already returned.

● Done, all green.

  - Snapshot: tests/fixtures/active__site_conductor_misclassified_finished.txt + insta snap — captured live before the state flipped, reproduced the Finished misclassification as a failing test.
  - Bug: spinner regex \p{L}… \( required a letter before the ellipsis; the live spinner was Wiring Postgres backups to R2… (3m 56s… — "R2" ends in a digit, so no spinner match → fell through to Finished.
  - Fix: [\p{L}\p{N}]… \( in claude_sessions.rs:1144. Full fixture suite passes with INSTA_UPDATE=no.

✻ Cooked for 1m 37s

※ recap: Goal was snapshotting the site_conductor session before its misclassified "finished" state flipped, then fixing the classifier bug. Snapshot captured, spinner regex fixed, all tests green. Nothing pending; next action is just committing if you want. (disable recaps in /config)
